notes: With skill achieved 100% pass rate across all 18 evals (97 of 97 expectations passed), demonstrating complete coverage of skill-guided workflows.
Without skill averaged 43.2% pass rate (42 of 97 expectations passed), with high variance (stddev 0.23) ranging from 14% (spec-to-backlog) to 100% (daily-standup).
The largest skill advantage appeared in complex multi-step workflows: spec-to-backlog (+86pp), epic-stories (+83pp), triage-timeout (+75pp), and create-bug (+75pp).

Without skill, the agent consistently failed to use the skill's CLI scripts (jira.mjs, confluence.mjs), instead falling back to raw REST API calls or MCP tools -- losing the structured workflow guardrails.
The only eval where without_skill matched with_skill was eval-6 (daily-standup), a simpler task with no tool-specific expectations and straightforward JQL + formatting requirements.
